headline: ​Occidental Petroleum Corporation (OXY) Posts $5.11 Billion Revenue, Down More Than 25%
summary: ​Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) is one of our Best Undervalued Stocks to Buy Under $100. The company currently trades at a forward price to earnings ratio of 9.92, below the sector average of 12.58. Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) recently posted FQ1 2026 earnings on May 5. ​During the quarter, the company posted $5.11 billion in […]

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Occidental Petroleum Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: Occidental Petroleum has lagged the broader market over the past year, and Wall Street analysts continue to maintain a cautious outlook on the stock’s near-term prospects.

headline: Chips Push the S&P 500 to 7,400, Supercycle or the Last Act of a Bubble?
summary: Monday was one of those sessions where the headline number - a modest 0.2% gain on the S&P 500 - doesn't begin to capture what's actually happening underneath the surface.
